theatres.title: The Odyssey
theatres.review: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War.
theatres.fullReview: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters, and trials that stretch both his cunning and his humanity to the breaking point.
theatres.take: Reviewers were close to unanimous — this one landed.

theatres.title: Insects – Hidden Heroes
theatres.review: How did our world come into being? Beneath our feet lies a class of animals far more numerous than any other.

similar.title: A Gorilla Story: Told by David Attenborough
Spider-Man: All Roads Lead to No Way Home

theatres.fullReview: How did our world come into being? Beneath our feet lies a class of animals far more numerous than any other. Let us embark on a journey through time dating back 400 million years, and witness how scattered pieces fit together to form a complete whole. Insects – Hidden Heroes takes us into the microcosm with stunning visuals. Narrated by screen icon Katharina Thalbach, the film poses a question: Must it be humanity or nature?

theatres.title: Was haben wir gelacht
theatres.review: An entire generation of Germans was raised on male comedians. But what about their female counterparts?
theatres.fullReview: An entire generation of Germans was raised on male comedians. But what about their female counterparts? Maren Kroymann, Hella von Sinnen, Bettina Böttinger, Esther Schweins, and Gaby Köster look back at the way women were portrayed on TV in the 1990s and early 2000s, when jokes at women’s expense were the order of the day.

theatres.title: Ninja Motherf*cking Destruction
theatres.review: At 18, Leonie and Marlene are best friends, convinced that nothing in the world can tear them apart.
theatres.fullReview: At 18, Leonie and Marlene are best friends, convinced that nothing in the world can tear them apart. But then Leonie falls in love with Naomi, and as she immerses herself in her first great love, she drifts further away from Marlene. However, Leonie increasingly finds the relationship with Naomi overwhelming, and only after their breakup does she realize how much she has isolated herself. She leaves Berlin and starts training as a gardener in Brandenburg, hoping to sort out her feelings and the world around her. But the past years have left their mark on everyone.

theatres.title: My Friend the Porn Star
theatres.review: Rosa Friedrich was never that interested in porn, until her friend Timo expresses a wish to star in an erotic film.

similar.title: X-Rated: The Greatest Adult Movies of All Time
X-Rated 2: The Greatest Adult Stars of All-Time

theatres.fullReview: Rosa Friedrich was never that interested in porn, until her friend Timo expresses a wish to star in an erotic film. So she agrees to help him get his project off the ground. However, the closer it gets to the shooting date, the more Timo feels embarrassed and doubtful about being involved in the first place. His face is ultimately replaced with the help of AI, and Rosa, together with a dominatrix, three trans women, a food-porn creator, a sex coach and other protagonists, continues with the film.

theatres.title: Minions & Monsters
theatres.review: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters…

similar.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge on the Run
The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants
Chickenhare and the Hamster of Darkness

theatres.fullReview: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to try and save the planet from the mayhem they had just created.

castPics.name: Pierre Coffin
castPics.character: James / Henry / Ed / Dick / The Minions (voice)

theatres.hook: Premiered at the Annecy International Animation Film Festival.

theatres.title: Evil Dead Burn
theatres.review: After her husband's abrupt death, Alice seeks solace with his remaining family — descendants of a leading researcher on demonic possession.
theatres.fullReview: After her husband's abrupt death, Alice seeks solace with his remaining family — descendants of a leading researcher on demonic possession. As her in-laws transform one by one into creatures that feed on fear, she comes to discover that the vows she took in life survive even in death.
theatres.take: Critics are split, though the writing found admirers.

ott.title: Heartstopper Forever
ott.review: It's a new school year for the Truham-Higgs gang. As Nick and Charlie's relationship deepens, their thoughts turn to life after the last bell rings.

similar.title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

ott.fullReview: It's a new school year for the Truham-Higgs gang. As Nick and Charlie's relationship deepens, their thoughts turn to life after the last bell rings.
ott.take: Word from reviewers is solidly good.

ott.title: Lucky
ott.review: When a multi-million-dollar heist goes sideways, con artist Lucky is forced to go on the run. Pursued by both the FBI and a ruthless crime boss, Lucky must…
ott.fullReview: When a multi-million-dollar heist goes sideways, con artist Lucky is forced to go on the run. Pursued by both the FBI and a ruthless crime boss, Lucky must fight for her life—and a way out.

ott.title: The East Palace
ott.review: A man who walks the spirit world and a court lady who hears the dead enter the East Palace by the king's orders — can they unravel its dark secrets?
ott.fullReview: A man who walks the spirit world and a court lady who hears the dead enter the East Palace by the king's orders — can they unravel its dark secrets?

ott.title: House of the Dragon
ott.review: The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.
ott.fullReview: The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights. In the case of the Targaryens, their slow fall begins when King Viserys breaks with a century of tradition by naming his daughter Rhaenyra heir to the Iron Throne. But when Viserys later fathers a son, the court is shocked when Rhaenyra retains her status as his heir, and seeds of division sow friction across the realm.
ott.take: Reviewers found plenty to like here.

ott.title: Silo
ott.review: In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

similar.title: The Man in the High Castle

ott.fullReview: In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously, engineer Juliette starts to uncover shocking secrets and the truth about the silo.
ott.take: Critics liked it, especially the performances and production design.

ott.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation
ott.review: When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

similar.title: The Aristocrat's Otherworldly Adventure: Serving Gods Who Go Too Far
I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince so I Can Take My Time Perfecting My Magical Ability
KamiKatsu: Working for God in a Godless World

ott.fullReview: When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every opportunity to live the life he's always wanted. Armed with new friends, some freshly acquired magical abilities, and the courage to do the things he's always dreamed of, he's embarking on an epic adventure—with all of his past experience intact!

ott.title: X-Men '97
ott.review: The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…
ott.fullReview: The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a dangerous and unexpected new future.
ott.take: Critics loved it — special praise for the writing and action.

ott.title: Enola Holmes 3
ott.review: Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

similar.title: Sherlock Holmes: A Game of Shadows

ott.fullReview: Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.
ott.take: Critics are split, though the performances and pacing found admirers.

comingSoon.title: Toy Story 5
comingSoon.review: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's…

similar.title: Maya the Bee: The Honey Games
Tinker Bell and the Lost Treasure

comingSoon.fullReview: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new threat to playtime.

comingSoon.title: Kraken
comingSoon.review: A marine biologist is doing research on a fish farm when she encounters several strange occurrences.
comingSoon.fullReview: A marine biologist is doing research on a fish farm when she encounters several strange occurrences. Along with the brutal deaths of two teenagers, all signs point to the deep fjord; can there be more to the depths than the eye can see?

comingSoon.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day
comingSoon.review: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends…
comingSoon.fullReview: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter Parker he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.

comingSoon.title: Everytime
comingSoon.review: A tragedy brings a mother, daughter, and teenage boy together. Struggling with blame and forgiveness, the unlikely trio…
comingSoon.fullReview: A tragedy brings a mother, daughter, and teenage boy together. Struggling with blame and forgiveness, the unlikely trio take a trip to Tenerife  for a family holiday that never happened. Under the glow of the sun,  past and present quietly start to overlap.

comingSoon.title: Tomorrow a Long Time Ago
comingSoon.review: In the turmoil of German reunification, Patty loses her job, loses her friend Jelena and disappears into the historic…
comingSoon.fullReview: In the turmoil of German reunification, Patty loses her job, loses her friend Jelena and disappears into the historic forest of the Kyffhäuser mountains. When she reappears in the nearby town thirty years later, barely aged, Jelena follows her ghostly apparition into the historical landscape of an East German present.

comingSoon.title: Gentle Monster
comingSoon.review: After relocating with her family to the countryside, a renowned pianist uncovers a life-shattering truth that forces…
comingSoon.fullReview: After relocating with her family to the countryside, a renowned pianist uncovers a life-shattering truth that forces her to confront the complexities of love, trust, and deception.

comingSoon.title: Lügen über meine Mutter
comingSoon.review: In the 1980s, the life of a family in a small village is determined by just one issue: the mother's body weight.
comingSoon.fullReview: In the 1980s, the life of a family in a small village is determined by just one issue: the mother's body weight. Her husband Werner decides that she needs to lose weight, Cornelia suffers as a result and their daughter Ela is caught in the middle.

comingSoon.title: The Blood Countess
comingSoon.review: The Blood Countess and her maid embark on a quest for the red elixir of life and a book that threatens the vampire…
comingSoon.fullReview: The Blood Countess and her maid embark on a quest for the red elixir of life and a book that threatens the vampire realm. Hot on their heels are a police inspector, two vampirologists, a vegetarian nephew and his therapist.
